Case.Subject: Demo: Email client crashes on startup
Case.Description:
Email client is crashing immediately after launch on Windows 11. Clean install attempted but issue persists.

Environment:
- Windows 11 Pro
- Email client v3.2.1
- Happens on every startup

Impact: User cannot access email

Case.Subject: Demo: API rate limit exceeded
Case.Description:
Getting 429 Too Many Requests errors when calling API endpoints. This started after upgrading to v2.0 of the integration.

API Key: Active
Rate limit: 10,000 calls/hour
Actual rate: ~2,000 calls/hour

Why are we hitting the limit?

Case.Subject: Demo: Database backup failed
Case.Description:
Automated backup job failed with error 'Insufficient storage space'. Database size is 250GB, backup location has 300GB free.

Last successful backup: 3 days ago
Backup frequency: Daily at 2 AM UTC
Next scheduled: Tomorrow at 2 AM UTC

Case.Subject: Demo: License key invalid
Case.Description:
License validation is failing with error 'Invalid product key'. License was purchased 2 weeks ago and worked initially.

License key format: XXX-YYYY-ZZZZ-AAAA
Product: Professional Edition
Licenses: 10 seats

No configuration changes were made.

Case.Subject: Demo: Documentation request
Case.Description:
Could you provide more detailed documentation on the REST API v3.0 migration guide? Our developers are confused about breaking changes from v2.9.

Specifically:
1. Authentication changes
2. Endpoint URL structure
3. Response format changes
4. Deprecation timeline

EmailMessage.Subject: Email client crashes on startup
EmailMessage.TextBody:
Hi Support,

My email client is crashing every time I try to open it. I've restarted my computer and tried reinstalling but nothing helps.

Please advise.

Thanks
EmailMessage.HtmlBody:
Hi Support,

My email client is crashing every time I try to open it. I've restarted my computer and tried reinstalling but nothing helps.

Please advise.

Thanks

EmailMessage.Subject: Re: API rate limit exceeded
EmailMessage.TextBody:
Looking at your logs, I see the issue. The SDK is making duplicate calls on error retry. Version 2.0 has a known issue with exponential backoff. Please downgrade to 1.9.5 or apply the hotfix from KB0012345.

Let me know if that resolves it.

Best,
Support
EmailMessage.HtmlBody: Looking at your logs, I see the issue...

CaseComment.CommentBody:
Attempted to reproduce issue on test machine with same OS and version. Unable to replicate.

Asking customer for:
1. Event viewer logs
2. Installed plugins list
3. System configuration
Resolved: Storage expansion approved and completed. Backup re-ran successfully. Database is now fully backed up.
